title: Optimization Project: Water Access in the Democratic Republic of Congo
description: Built scalable optimization pipelines in Julia to identify high-impact locations for new wells in the DRC. The model prioritized well placement to maximize population reach and minimize travel distance, improving projected water access by 19%.

title: Predictive & Prescriptive Solar Battery Charging
description: Developed predictive models to forecast solar energy availability and optimization algorithms to determine optimal battery charging, storage, and selling strategies for electricity markets in Southern California.

title: Analytics Lab: Boston Public Health Commission Occupancy Prediction
description: Built machine learning models to forecast 14-day homeless shelter occupancy for the Boston Public Health Commission, improving prediction accuracy by 50% and helping reduce overflow risk through better capacity planning.

title: Yelp Sentiment Analysis
description: Performed sentiment analysis on Yelp reviews using natural language processing to measure customer satisfaction and identify patterns in user feedback across businesses and categories.

title: Voltage Discharge Prediction & Materials Analysis
description: Analyzed sensor data from lab-scale green hydrogen electrolyzers to predict voltage discharge curves and evaluate material performance under intermittent renewable energy conditions.

title: Optimization Project: F1 Race Location Planning
description: Developed an optimization model in AMPL to redesign the Formula 1 race calendar to minimize global travel distance while satisfying logistical constraints, reducing estimated emissions by 927 tons of CO₂ per team.

title: MongoDB vs SQL Query Performance Analysis
description: Compared relational and non-relational database performance using the Yelp dataset, evaluating query speed, scalability, and usability of SQL versus MongoDB for large-scale analytics tasks.
